mapper.select:
SELECT grp_cd, grp_nm, grp_desc, use_yn, sort_ord, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM tb_com_code_grp
AND grp_cd LIKE CONCAT('%', #{grpCd}, '%')
AND grp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{grpNm}, '%')
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
ORDER BY sort_ord, grp_cd

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_com_code_grp
AND grp_cd LIKE CONCAT('%', #{grpCd}, '%')
AND grp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{grpNm}, '%')
AND use_yn = #{useYn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_com_code_grp (grp_cd, grp_nm, grp_desc, use_yn, sort_ord, created_by) VALUES (#{grpCd}, #{grpNm}, #{grpDesc}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT grp_cd, code, code_nm, code_desc, use_yn, sort_ord, attr1, attr2, attr3, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM tb_com_code WHERE grp_cd = #{grpCd} ORDER BY sort_ord, code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_com_code WHERE grp_cd = #{grpCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_com_code (grp_cd, code, code_nm, code_desc, use_yn, sort_ord, attr1, attr2, attr3, created_by) VALUES (#{grpCd}, #{code}, #{codeNm}, #{codeDesc}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{attr1}, #{attr2}, #{attr3}, #{createdBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_com_code WHERE grp_cd = #{grpCd} AND code = #{code}
